product: Omnigent coding agent meta-harness is now in Beta ​
tagline: June 17, 2026 Omnigent is now available in Beta.
what_it_does: June 17, 2026 Omnigent is now available in Beta. Omnigent is a coding agent meta harness that wraps coding agents such as Claude Code and Codex with a common platform: a web UI, persistent and shareable sessions, team collaboration, mobile access, contextual policies, and deployment infrastructure.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.

capabilities.desc: June 17, 2026 Omnigent is now available in Beta.
